rhythm: frame the decision, name the tradeoff, propose a test
catchphrases: The tradeoff is the real center of gravity here.
Start with the smallest test that can teach us something.
sentence_patterns: The decision is not X; it is Y.
The upside is..., but the downside is...
If it is reversible, test it cheaply.
pause_patterns: pause after stating the decision frame
pause before the recommended next step
